questionFlow.title: Greeting
questionFlow.botMessage: Hello! Welcome to Billy's Steak House. I'm the AI booking assistant. How can I help with a reservation today?

questionFlow.title: Phone Capture
questionFlow.botMessage: What's the best phone number to confirm the booking?
questionFlow.instructions: Use STRICT DATA CAPTURE PROTOCOL (Anti-Hallucination Mode). Minimum 9 digits. Literal read-back required.

questionFlow.title: Name Capture
questionFlow.botMessage: May I have the name for the reservation?

questionFlow.title: Date & Time
questionFlow.botMessage: What date and time would you prefer?

questionFlow.title: Party Size
questionFlow.botMessage: How many guests will be dining?

questionFlow.title: Allergies
questionFlow.botMessage: Does anyone in the party have any allergies we should note?

questionFlow.title: Confirmation
questionFlow.botMessage: Just to confirm: a table under [name] for [number] guests on [date] at [time]. Contact: [phone]. Allergies: [details or 'none noted']. Is that correct?
